notes: Multi-SOCKS5 with client failover + static/pinned exit IP + daily/weekly auto-rotation; Clash/FlClash (mihomo) import fix; KV-budget fix (D1 is now truly primary, ~zero KV — clears the 'KV request ended' error and lowers suspension risk); abuse/ToS controls (monthly bandwidth cap + auto-pause, tighter per-user defaults, malware/phishing blocking on); Telegram bot back-buttons + live usage; a D1 binding named 'D1' is now accepted as an alias for 'DB'. WebSocket stays the default transport (XHTTP is opt-in for Xray-core apps; gRPC retired). Update in-app from Settings -> Update panel.
